name: anvil
description: Obara India sales-ops execution layer. Vercel serverless functions over Supabase Postgres, with a unified browser app built from src/legacy plus the bridge client.

scripts.build: npm run build:legacy && npm run build:v3 && npm run build:v3-vite
scripts.check: for f in $(find api -name '*.js' | sort); do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node --check src/client/obara-client.js && node --check src/scripts/build-unified-app.mjs && node --check src/scripts/build-v3.mjs && node --check src/v3/rbac.js && node --check src/v3/preferences.js
scripts.predeploy: npm run build && npm run check && npm run verify
